app[content][legal]: © EMINOMA. Valve, the Valve logo, Steam, the Steam logo, Team Fortress, and the Team Fortress logo are trademarks and/or registered trademarks of Valve Corporation. Team Fortress 2 Classified is a fan creation and is not affiliated with Valve Corporation.
app[content][about]: [p][b]Off the Record[/b] is a compilation of the original music tracks used thus far in [b]Team Fortress 2 Classified[/b]'s main menu and promotional media, composed by rogue talent Magnus, MrModez, & Ram99.[/p][p]Years of tranquilizing and mine-laying and billionaire-escorting have been spent listening to, or having recently listened to, these original songs. Throw on this collection for a taste of TF2 Classified's soundscape without the investment podcasts or Avenged Sevenfold albums you usually have blaring over it.[/p]
app[content][short_description]: Off the Record, the original soundtrack of Team Fortress 2 Classified. These spy-filmic, big-band-style tracks are used across TF2 Classified's promo shorts and menus.
